DEFENDANT ALICE TSE WAIVES SERVICE IN OPEN COURT FOR DEFENDANT INNOVISTECH REALTY. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHAEL MAU. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
